pool.title: Claude 4.7 ships with 1M-token context window
pool.content: Anthropic announces Claude 4.7 Opus with 1 million token context window, available now in the API.

pool.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5 with improved reasoning
pool.content: GPT-5 delivers state-of-the-art reasoning across math, code, and science benchmarks.

pool.title: Local LLaMA-4 405B beats Claude on math benchmarks
pool.content: Meta's open-weights LLaMA-4 405B model surpasses Claude 4 Opus on AIME and IMO benchmarks.

pool.title: AI startup raises $50M Series B for code-gen agents
pool.content: CodeAcme raises $50M Series B led by Andreessen Horowitz to scale code-generation agents.

pool.title: Cursor adds background agents in 1.0 release
pool.content: Cursor 1.0 introduces background agents that run long-form coding tasks asynchronously.
